# Pest Control 99

> Pest Control 99 (operated by Multi Pest Care LLP) is a professional pest control company providing same-day, warranty-backed pest management for homes, offices, societies and commercial spaces across Mumbai, Thane, Navi Mumbai, Lonavala and Pune in Maharashtra, India.

Pest Control 99 uses safe, low-odour, CIB&RC-approved treatments that are child- and pet-safe once dry. Every service is backed by a written warranty and transparent, all-inclusive pricing with no hidden charges.

Key facts:
- Brand: Pest Control 99 — a brand operated by Multi Pest Care LLP
- Service areas: Mumbai, Thane, Navi Mumbai, Lonavala, Pune (Maharashtra, India)
- Phone / WhatsApp: +91 80807 48282
- Email: accounts@pestcontrol99.com
- Address: 503 Sai Rushabh CHS Ltd, Geeta Nagar Phase 1, Mira Road, Thane, Maharashtra 401107, India
- Hours: Same-day service with 24/7 emergency support
- Warranty: up to 365 days (general pest control), up to 5 years (termite), 90 days (rodent)
- Customer rating: 4.8/5 from 150+ verified service reviews
- Indicative pricing: one-time cockroach/ant control from ₹1,000; rodent control from ₹1,000; mosquito control from ₹800; termite treatment from ₹2,000 (final quote after inspection)

## Pest Control Services
- [Cockroach Pest Control in Mumbai](https://www.pestcontrol99.com/services/cockroach-pest-control/): Odourless, child- and pet-safe gel treatment with a 365-day warranty.
- [Mosquito Pest Control in Mumbai](https://www.pestcontrol99.com/services/mosquito-pest-control/): Same-day fogging and larvicide treatment to reduce dengue and malaria risk.
- [Termite Control in Mumbai](https://www.pestcontrol99.com/services/termite-pest-control/): Low-odour anti-termite (deemak) treatment with neat drill-and-seal and up to a 5-year warranty.
- [Rodent & Rat Control in Mumbai](https://www.pestcontrol99.com/services/rodent-pest-control/): Trapping, baiting and entry-point sealing with a 90-day warranty.
- [Honey Bee Removal in Mumbai](https://www.pestcontrol99.com/services/honey-bee-pest-control/): Safe beehive removal by trained technicians.
- [Wood Borer Control in Mumbai](https://www.pestcontrol99.com/services/wood-borer-control/): Treatment to protect furniture and woodwork from powder-post beetles.
- [All Pest Control Services](https://www.pestcontrol99.com/services/): Overview of every residential and commercial pest control service offered.

## Service Locations
- [Pest Control in Lonavala](https://www.pestcontrol99.com/pest-control-in-lonavala/): Monsoon pest control for villas, resorts, hotels and homestays in Lonavala.

## Company
- [About Pest Control 99](https://www.pestcontrol99.com/about/): Company background, licensing and CIB&RC-approved methods (operated by Multi Pest Care LLP).
- [Contact Us](https://www.pestcontrol99.com/contact/): Phone, WhatsApp, email and enquiry form.
- [Get a Free Quote](https://www.pestcontrol99.com/quote/): Instant price estimate and same-day booking for homes and businesses.
- [Blog](https://www.pestcontrol99.com/blog/): Pest control tips, prevention guides and seasonal (monsoon) advice for Mumbai and India.
